name: Telegram Bot API
description: Telegram Bot API enables building bots to send messages, photos, documents, and manage chat interactions. Agents can discover and control Telegram bots programmatically through a simple HTTP interface.

auth.description: Bot token is included in the URL path as /bot{token}/method

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a text message to a chat. Agents can deliver notifications, alerts, and formatted text responses to Telegram users.

capabilities.name: send_photo
capabilities.description: Send a photo to a chat. Agents can deliver images from URLs or file IDs to communicate visually.

capabilities.name: send_document
capabilities.description: Send a document or file to a chat. Agents can deliver PDFs, spreadsheets, and other files to users.

capabilities.name: get_updates
capabilities.description: Poll for new messages and updates from chats. Agents can receive user messages, commands, and callback queries.

capabilities.name: set_webhook
capabilities.description: Set up a webhook URL to receive updates in real-time. Alternative to polling for new messages.

capabilities.name: get_chat
capabilities.description: Get chat information. Agents can retrieve chat details, member counts, and chat metadata.

capabilities.name: edit_message
capabilities.description: Edit the text of a previously sent message. Agents can update messages with new content.
